13529.Title: Void Mass
13529.Info: Void Masses appear all over the map in [Act 3](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479260) as part of the [Dark Hearts](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479448) wish.

13544.Title: Lost Flea
13544.Info: Find **Lost Fleas** and collect rewards from the [Fleamaster Mooshka](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=477856)

13545.Title: Mask Shard
13545.Info: Collect four to add a permanent health Mask

13548.Title: Spool Fragment
13548.Info: Collect two to gain an extra Spool

13551.Title: Choral Commandment
13551.Info: Can be sold to [Relic Seeker Scrounge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478209) for 90 Rosaries

13552.Title: Memory Locket
13552.Info: Memory Lockets are used to add new Tool slots to your Crests.

13580.Title: Weaver Effigy
13580.Info: Can be sold to [Relic Seeker Scrounge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478209) for 240 Rosaries

13581.Title: Bone Scroll
13581.Info: Can be sold to [Relic Seeker Scrounge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478209) for 50 Rosaries

13592.Title: Rune Harp
13592.Info: Can be sold to [Relic Seeker Scrounge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478209) for 110 Rosaries

13593.Title: Arcane Egg
13593.Info: Can be sold to [Relic Seeker Scrounge](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478209) for 250 Rosaries

13594.Title: Psalm Cylinder
13594.Info: Can be given to [Vaultkeeper Cardinius](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478640) for Melodies and 100 - 200 Rosaries

13595.Title: Memento
13595.Info: Decorative mementos that are displayed at [Bellhome](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=479175)

13547.Title: Shard Bundle
13547.Info: Contains 80 - 220 Shell Shards. Break it open in your inventory.

13559.Title: Rosary String
13559.Info: Contains 30 - 340 Rosaries. Break it open in your inventory.

13563.Title: Silkeater
13563.Info: Consume to retrieve lost valuables after death

13567.Title: Tool
13567.Info: _Collect all tools to unlock the Arsenal achievement._

13579.Title: Journal Entry
13579.Template: Defeat ?? to complete the hunter's notes.
13579.Info: Begin the [Bugs of Pharloom](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478042) wish to unlock the [Hunter's Journal](https://mapgenie.io/hollow-knight-silksong/maps/pharloom?locationIds=478043).
